name: Mamluks
startIntroPart1: Forged from the ranks of slave-soldiers, the Mamluks once rose to rule Egypt and Syria, turning their discipline, loyalty, and cavalry skill into an empire, can the same be repeated under your rule, Baibars?
startIntroPart2: Under you, Baibars, may the Mamluk war machine shatter and repel its enemies and rise from the ashes left in stead of their destruction..
declaringWar: By sword and saddle, we strike.
introduction: I am Baibars of the Mamluks. Speak, and be judged.
hateHello: What is it that you want?
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
afterPeace: Very well, our blades are sheathed.
tradeRequest: Both steel and coin may serve us both.
denounced: We will answer this in time.
declaringfriendship: Let our banners stand together in a eternal peace.
